title: Viewing things with more previousness and emotion — one-line note (May 2024)
html:
TL;DR

  • One-line Apple Note from May 8, 2024 titled simply "A" — body reads: "Viewing things with more previousness and emotion."
  • Almost certainly a typo for "presentness" — Yahir is naming a perceptual goal: see things with more presentness and emotion. Same neighborhood as feel your emotions and heightened perception trigger.
  • Captured the same day as the longer "biggest lesson" note — these are sibling micro-thoughts from one sitting; this one is the perceptual aphorism, that one is the lesson statement.
  • Falls in the post-Sam-breakup window (early May 2024, right after the 4/30 Sam doc) — heightened-emotion mode was active, this note may be naming what he wanted to do with that intensity.
  • Classic one-liner: title is a single letter, body is a single sentence, never returned to.

What "previousness" probably means

  • Most likely: typo for presentness (mindfulness-adjacent, the be-here-now move).
  • Alternative reading: holding "previousness" as a real word — viewing things with awareness of the prior (history, accumulated context, lineage) — would slot next to lineage as fate and cyclical time.
  • The first reading is more probable given Yahir's surrounding May 2024 vocabulary; flagging the second so densify can re-test if the word recurs.

Connections

  • 2024 05 08 biggest lesson — same-day sibling note
  • feel your emotions · heightened perception trigger — neighborhood
  • — one-liner subtype
  • 2024 04 30 thoughts and things 43024 regarding sam solum — emotional context
  • — genre
